title: Dinangorou Heat Wave
lead: Dinangorou is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.49. This anomaly has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Dinangorou has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 21.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 23%, and the wind speed is approximately 8.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's energy consumption is expected to surge due to increased cooling demands.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
